title: damnacanthus macrophyllus var. parvispinus
intro: Damnacanthus macrophyllus var. parvispinus, also known as the medicinal plant 'Gyeoulmakgonggi', is a variant of the Damnacanthus macrophyllus plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Damnacanthus macrophyllus var. parvispinus include relieving fever, reducing swelling, and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. It is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Korean medicine as a component of various herbal prescriptions.
